title: Node Test Runner, Runtime Faults, Compile Rejections, Async Leaks, and CLI Tests · Type-System Trace: Pokedex Ts Test Layer Map
summary: Tests cast fixtures, mock global fetch across files, assert only snapshots, omit compile-negative cases, leave timers and listeners active, and never execute emitted JavaScript. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts test layer map increment in layered runtime and compile-time evidence harness. Learners progress through predicti…
objectives: Separate pure validator and reducer, fetch, readline, cache, persistence, subprocess, compile-negative, fuzz-like, and controlled live smoke evidence.
Bound input, URL, response, nested arrays, cache, history, collection, queue, retries, output, file size, and diagnostic detail.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
